steps.t: The fight-arena is the lowered floorspace in the centre of the arena, marked by green banners. The dwarf-club is in your inventory. Gísli Strongclub h…
Competitors in the lowered fight-arena wish to steal the glorious beer for themselves. Give the greedy folks around you a few good whacks for their im…
Gísli Strongclub is in the arena at Thorin's Hall. You should speak with Gísli Strongclub to boast of your excellence in collecting the glorious beer.
